violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Bucket with wiping cloth was found with 0ppm chlorine. Wiping cloth solutions should be at least 100ppm.

Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. Test strips were not available for testing chlorine sanitizing solutions for washing dishes. Testing strips should be available to assure proper strengths are being used for sanitizing.
